mapper.select:
SELECT c.id AS commentId, c.user_id AS userId, u.username AS username, c.content AS content, c.like_count AS likeCount, c.type AS type, CASE WHEN c.type = 0 THEN '歌曲评论' WHEN c.type = 1 THEN '歌单评论' ELSE '评论' END AS typeName, CASE WHEN c.type = 0 THEN c.song_id WHEN c.type = 1 THEN c.playlist_id ELSE c.target_id END AS targetId, CASE WHEN c.type = 0 THEN s.name WHEN c.type = 1 THEN p.title ELSE '未知目标' END AS targetTitle, c.create_time AS createTime FROM tb_comment c LEFT JOIN tb_user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN tb_song s ON c.song_id = s.id LEFT JOIN tb_playlist p ON c.playlist_id = p.id
c.type in (0, 1)
AND c.type = #{type}
AND ( c.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
